channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists found a way to plant ideas in dreams to boost creativity
item.description: Sleeping on a problem might be more powerful than we ever imagined. Neuroscientists at Northwestern University have shown that dreams can actually be ...

item.title: Scientists find nerves actively fuel pancreatic cancer
item.description: Scientists have uncovered a hidden partnership between pancreatic cancer and the nervous system. Support cells in the pancreas lure nerve fibers, whic...

item.title: Why some kids struggle with math even when they try hard
item.description: A new Stanford study suggests math struggles may be about more than numbers. Children who had difficulty with math were less likely to adjust their th...

item.title: AI uncovers the hidden genetic control centers driving Alzheimer’s
item.description: Scientists have created the most detailed maps yet of how genes control one another inside the brains of people with Alzheimer’s disease. Using a powe...

item.title: Tracking global water circulation using atomic fingerprints
item.description: Scientists have developed a powerful new way to trace the journey of water across the planet by reading tiny atomic clues hidden inside it. Slightly h...

item.title: NSF launches $100M National Quantum and Nanotechnology Research Infrastructure program
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation is investing up to $100 million to establish a nationwide network of open-access research facilities for quantum ...

item.title: NSF announces first AI-ENGAGE awards to modernize global agriculture
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation, in coordination with partner agencies from Australia, India and Japan, today announced the first cohort of award...

item.title: Transitioning NCAR-Wyoming Supercomputing Center operations
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation has informed the NSF National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR) that management and operations of the NCAR-W...

item.title: NSF and partners invest $9M in AI-focused math education program
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation Directorate for Social, Behavioral, and Economic Sciences (NSF SBE) has launched the Collaboratory to Advance Mat...

item.title: Intent to restructure critical weather science infrastructure
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation (NSF) announced today that the agency is reviewing the structure of the research and observational capabilities o...
